headline: GM Pauses Indiana Battery Plant To Rebalance EV Investment And Capacity
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) has paused construction of its planned US$3.5 billion electric vehicle battery plant in Indiana. The company has put the project on hold indefinitely as it reassesses U.S. EV demand and its future production needs. The Indiana facility was intended to support GM's broader electrification plans and its battery supply chain in the U.S. For readers tracking NYSE:GM, this move comes as the company balances its traditional internal combustion business with a large push...
